name: state_sensitive_routing_table_v0_1
purpose: Explicit degree-3 local routing table for structural controller state (A,sigma,tau).
canonical_sentence: Structural state selects the local preference law; burden may override it transiently.

runtime_note.state_sensitive: Use table directly as preferred exit law.
runtime_note.state_sensitive_under_load: Use table as preferred exit law, then allow burden-threshold override to divert to the alternate.
